task_name: FLS Training Platform Overview / Product Demonstration
reasoning: This video is a compilation of product demonstrations and marketing material showcasing various FLS/surgical training simulators and platforms (Dexter, Momentis, anovo, Symani, MMI systems). It contains narration overlays, captions like 'FASTER PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT', 'ACCELERATED CLINICAL PROFICIENCY ON ROBOT', 'CONSOLE INTEGRATION OPTIONS', 'HIGHLY REALISTIC CONTENT', and 'AN ENTIRE CONTINUUM OF TRAINING POSSIBILITIES'. No actual trainee is performing a single FLS task from start to completion.
rationale_for_no_score: This is educational/promotional content, not a performance video. It shows multiple different platforms and snippets of simulated tasks with marketing messaging, instructor overlays, and product feature showcases. Per the assessment instructions, instructional videos with narration, overlays, or lecture content should NOT be scored; teaching content should be extracted instead.

video_segments_identified.content: Distalmotion product dev workstation with tablet interface
Dexter Simulator - Peg Transfer-like task with teal blocks
Symani Simulator System by MMI - synthetic vessel with suture
Dexter Simulator - peg transfer setup on screen
VR/VirtaMed user with headset - immersive training demo
Robotic surgery OR visualization with animated instruments

demonstrated_techniques: Laparoscopic instrument handling on multiple simulator platforms
verbal_cues: WIDE RANGE OF CONSOLE INTEGRATION OPTIONS
AN ENTIRE CONTINUUM OF TRAINING POSSIBILITIES
teaching_content.educational_focus: Multi-platform surgical simulator comparison and feature overview; marketing demonstration of various training systems and their capabilities across basic FLS tasks and advanced surgical procedures
teaching_content.skill_level_demonstrated: marketing/expert level - platforms are presented as professional training tools, not individual trainee performance

cannot_score: No completion time measurable from start to finish of one task
Multiple platforms and tasks shown; no dedicated performance video
Video is edited marketing content, not raw task execution
Segment durations are promotional, not task-representative
conclusion: This video should NOT be scored as an FLS task performance. It is instructional/promotional content showcasing multiple surgical training simulators. No individual trainee performance, no measurable task completion, and no penalty assessment is applicable.
